nasb.text: Tamar put ashes on her head and tore her long-sleeved garment which was on her; and she put her hand on her head and went away, crying aloud as she went.

esv.text: And Tamar put ashes on her head and tore the long robe that she wore. And she laid her hand on her head and went away, crying aloud as she went.

cnv.text: 他瑪把塵土撒在自己的頭上，撕裂身上的長袖彩衣，又把一隻手放在頭上，一邊行走一邊哭叫。

ccb.text: 她玛把灰尘撒在头上，撕破身上的彩衣，双手抱着头，一面走一面哭。
